name: Act-On
description:
Act-On is a marketing automation. Renowned for its time-saving features, it helps businesses streamline their digital marketing efforts. It's popular among marketers for its ability to manage email campaigns, social media, and customer data on one platform, so it’s perfect for teams seeking an all-in-one solution. 

Here’s what you need to know:

  • Starting at $900/month for the professional plan and $2000/month for the enterprise plan, Act-On is a full-scope marketing automation solution
  • Its marketing automation capabilities empower your marketing team to automate campaigns across channels (including on social!)
  • Email marketing tools help with comprehensive campaign management and customer outreach
  • While it might seem like a typical marketing automation solution, Act-On has a social media integration, too. You can manage and analyze social media alongside other marketing channels, which makes it perfect for teams looking for an all-in-one solution
  • Act-On integrates with various digital marketing channels, including Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, and more.

Key Features:

✅   Marketing campaign automation

✅   Email campaign management

✅   Social media analytics
what_people_say:
What people say :

Users love Act-On for social media management due to its marketing-informed approach. With smart follow-ups and a myriad of customizations, it’s easy to automate your social media presence along with the rest of your marketing activities. Generally, customers especially value its comprehensive suite of tools for nurturing leads and analyzing marketing performance.

Here’s what they have to say:

“We are happy to have Act-On, it is a great program that allows us to find a better solution to the management of social networks. It is very good and helps to understand the idea of simple synthesis and extensive customization of social media communication mechanisms.”

“Act-On has revolutionized our marketing workflow, though it can be overwhelming with its multitude of features. I’m not sure we’re properly utilizing it. The social media tools are underdeveloped, but they work for now. Hopefully they improve.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 User-friendly interface
  • 🚫 Affordable
  • 🚫 Built-out social media management tools
